---
title: "Computational Musicology"
author: "Sarguni Kaur Khurana"
format: 
  dashboard: 
    orientation: columns
---

# Computational Musicology- Corpus

In the past year, I have been to 3 concerts. I choose to go to concerts only for those artists for whom I like at least 2/3 albums. This is a comparison of the 3 artists whose concert I saw, and the albums they toured with.

# Chromagrams

### Row

WIP

### Row

WIP

### Row

WIP

# Keygram

WIP

### Row

WIP

# Tempogram

### Row

WIP

### Row

WIP

### Row

WIP

# Classfication
